author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #10 is confirmed! Join us this Wednesday at 2200 UTC! 

The Atlas Brew is a Star Atlas Community Event. Made by the community, for the community   

It happens every Wednesday in the Voice Chat channel 

In these events we will talk about different Star Atlas topics that the community will decide beforehand on ⁠No Access channel, as well as theorycrafting and even helping newcomers who need a little bit of guidance in the Star Atlas Metaverse 

This week's main topic: SHIPS!: Dive deep with us into the world of ships!! What types of ships are there? What are their different configurations? What utility do they have now and will have in the future? Find out which is the ship that best suits your style! 
 
See you all on Wednesday at 22:00 UTC!

Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in the Quiz! Winner gets one ship!

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/965962785613832232
